prompt: Create a hyper-realistic surreal cinematic digital artwork in vertical 3:4 format showing a full-body handsome adult male figure standing confidently at the exact center edge of a gigantic rooftop infinity pool suspended high above a futuristic city skyline at dawn. The man faces the camera with a calm fashion-editorial pose, one hand in his trouser pocket, wearing an open flowing silky white satin shirt with wind-blown tails, a necklace, loose black trousers, and black-and-white sneakers; his face should be softly anonymized/blurred while keeping realistic hair and body proportions. The pool water is perfectly split down the middle from the foreground toward his feet, forming a deep dark vertical chasm with sharp raised water walls, sparkling droplets, ripples around both shoes, and mirror-like reflections across the water surface. Behind him, show a vast futuristic metropolis rising through clouds, with many sleek skyscrapers and one very tall needle-like tower on the right, bathed in warm sunrise light from the left. In the sky, include a massive broken moon or asteroid sphere on the upper right and exactly 7 visible floating rocky fragments of different sizes scattered around it. Use dramatic dawn colors, blue and gold atmospheric haze, volumetric clouds, crisp reflections, ultra-detailed water physics, photorealistic fabric sheen, cinematic wide-angle perspective, high dynamic range, and a dreamlike luxury sci-fi mood. Avoid text, logos, extra people, borders, or cartoon styling.
